title: Effect of Heavy Fuel Combustion in a Gas Power Plant on Turbine Performance: A Review
abstract:
Received: 16 December 2021 
Accepted: 18 January 2022 
The current review focuses on the utilization of heavy fuel in operating gas turbine and 
their effect on the power plant performance. The literature survey includes a comparison 
of the different studies to reveal the effect of the fuel property on the combustion 
efficiency and fuel consumption. the most important of which is the generation of electric 
power by heavy fuels in power stations that use turbines. Gas turbine is becoming
